properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Reya is not unlocked with this skin. Reya can only be unlocked by completing Reya Reborn - the second Variant of the Idyllglen adventure in the Descent into Avernus Campaign.

fullName.display: 蕾雅·曼特尔芒，扎瑞尔的化身

backstory.original: Born in the land of Turmish, Reya came to the holy city of Elturel to train as a Hellrider when she was twelve. As a faithful follower of Torm, Reya trained to sacrifice herself for the greater good. That preparation led to her taking Zariel's sword and joining the Champions, after rescuing the city of Elturel from Avernus.
backstory.display: 蕾雅出生在突米斯的土地上，她在 12 岁时来到圣城艾尔托瑞尔，受训成为一名地狱骑士。作为托姆的忠实追随者，蕾雅的训练让她能够为大局而牺牲自己。这种精神使她在从阿弗纳斯救下艾尔托瑞尔城之后，接过了扎瑞尔的剑，加入了勇士们。

description.original: Reya leaps out and slashes at a random enemy, cleaving nearby enemies as well.
description.display: 蕾雅跳起并劈砍一名随机敌人，同时顺劈附近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Reya leaps out and slashes at a random enemy with the Sword of Zariel, cleaving nearby enemies as well.
longDescription.display: 蕾雅跳起用扎瑞尔之剑劈砍一名随机敌人，同时顺劈附近的敌人。

description.original: Lulu puts all enemies to sleep for 10 seconds, then, Reya swings her sword in a massive circle.
description.display: 露露使所有敌人沉睡 10 秒，随后蕾雅用剑挥出一个大圆环。

longDescription.original: Reya launches to the sky, she lands by SLAMMING the Sword of Zariel into the ground with a shockwave summoning Zariel and her friend Lulu. While Reya communes with Zariel, Lulu zips around the board, putting all enemies to sleep for 10 seconds. While the enemies are asleep and Reya remains in her pose, the Champions deal massive damage against them. When the 10 seconds is complete, Reya removes the sword and swings it in a massive circle.
longDescription.display: 蕾雅跳到空中，下落时用扎瑞尔之剑猛击地面制造震荡波，并召唤出扎瑞尔和她的好友露露。在蕾雅与扎瑞尔交流时，露露会迅速在战场上穿梭，使所有敌人沉睡 10 秒。敌人入睡和蕾雅保持不动时，勇士可对敌人造成高额伤害。10 秒后，蕾雅会收回剑并使出大范围圆环形斩击。

description.desc: Reya imbues adjacent Champions with her Searing Radiance, causing their attacks to deal $(amount)% more damage.
蕾雅用灼热光辉灌注相邻勇士，使他们的攻击伤害提高 $(amount)%。
Fiends become Reya's Favored Foe and take $(amount)% more damage from Reya and adjacent champions.
炼狱生物成为蕾雅的偏好对手，蕾雅与相邻勇士对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

description.pre: The gaze of Zariel turns from Reya and sweeps across the formation, looking at a random number of unique champions before returning to Reya. Once it returns to Reya it increases the effect of Searing Radiance by $(amount)% for each Champion it looked at, including Reya, stacking multiplicatively.
扎瑞尔的目光脱离蕾雅并扫过整个阵型，在转回蕾雅身上之前注视随机数量的勇士。当它继续开始注视蕾雅时，每注视过一名勇士（包括蕾雅），提升灼热光辉的效果 $(amount)%。以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: The gaze of Zariel passes over champions, the more it visits prior to Reya the higher the bonus to her buffs.
tipText.display: 扎瑞尔的目光笼罩勇士。蕾雅前方的目光落点越多，她的增益就越强。

description.desc: All Lawful aligned Champions' damage is increased by $(amount)%. All Good aligned Champions' damage is increased by $(amount)%.
所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。所有善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Reya buffs Good and Lawful Champions more than any other.
tipText.display: 蕾雅对善良和守序勇士的强化比其他勇士更多。

description.desc: Echoes of Zariel is guaranteed to look at all Good aligned Champions in the formation before returning to Reya.
回到蕾雅身上之前，扎瑞尔的回声会注视阵型中所有的善良阵营勇士

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: The gaze of Zariel focuses on Good aligned Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 扎瑞尔的目光击中在善良勇士身上。

description.desc: Echoes of Zariel is guaranteed to look at all Lawful aligned Champions in the formation before returning to Reya.
回到蕾雅身上之前，扎瑞尔的回声会注视阵型中所有的守序阵营勇士

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount

specializationDescription.original: The gaze of Zariel focuses on Lawful aligned Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 扎瑞尔的目光击中在守序勇士身上。

name.display: 强化阵型技能 2：叠层前（仅专长）

description.original: I'm a Hellrider, it's what I do.
description.display: 我是地狱骑士，这是我该做的事。

description.original: Avernus changed me, to the core of who I am.
description.display: 是阿弗纳斯让我脱胎换骨变了一个人。

description.original: We have the Angel Zariel watching us.
description.display: 天使扎瑞尔在守护着我们。

description.original: Zariel has blessed us with much.
Zariel has warned me. Our trials are not yet complete.
description.display: 扎瑞尔预警过我。我们面临的考验还没结束。

description.original: It's a ceremonial title, but... I like it.
description.display: 虽然只是个虚名头衔，但是......我挺喜欢的。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack bonus of Echoes of Zariel by $amount%.

description.original: I am her mercy. I am her wrath. I am all that she was, is, and will be.
description.display: 我即她之仁慈，我即她之愤怒。她之过去、现在与未来皆归于我身。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack bonus of Echoes of Zariel by $amount%.

description.original: Out of darkness comes the light.
Tiamat has come. We're working on a plan to lure her from the city.
description.display: 提亚马特来了。我们正在想办法把她引出城。

effects.description: Reya may be used in any Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Born in the land of Turmish, Reya came to the holy city of Elturel to train as a Hellrider when she was twelve. As a faithful follower of Torm, Reya trained to sacrifice herself for the greater good. That preparation led to her taking Zariel's sword and joining the Champions, after rescuing the city of Elturel from Avernus.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Reya buffs the DPS of adjacent, Lawful and Good Champions.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Reya is not unlocked with this skin. Reya can only be unlocked by completing Reya Reborn - the second Variant of the Idyllglen adventure in the Descent into Avernus Campaign.

character_sheet_details.full_name: 蕾雅·曼特尔芒，扎瑞尔的化身
character_sheet_details.backstory: 蕾雅出生在突米斯的土地上，她在 12 岁时来到圣城艾尔托瑞尔，受训成为一名地狱骑士。作为托姆的忠实追随者，蕾雅的训练让她能够为大局而牺牲自己。这种精神使她在从阿弗纳斯救下艾尔托瑞尔城之后，接过了扎瑞尔的剑，加入了勇士们。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 蕾雅能够强化相邻的伤害输出者、守序阵营和善良阵营的勇士。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士蕾雅不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“蕾雅的重生”——“坠入阿弗纳斯”战役中“伊迪尔格伦”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁蕾雅。
